title: Regional Director
description:
Minimum Requirement:

  • Min. 10 years in a similar management role with considerable experience in data centres.
  • Knowledge of planning & permitting requirements specifically those impacting data centre development.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office, and IT-based calculation tools.
  • Knowledge of health and safety legislation, contract law, and business law
  • Excellent communication (verbal, written, presentation) and people management skills.
  • Ability to manage international projects, invoicing, and creditcontrol.
  • Strong leadership, networking, and meeting facilitation skills.
  • Capacity to prioritise workload, act at both engineering and board level, and contribute to business success.


Role Responsibilities:

  • Lead and oversee APAC office, driving team development, profitability and sustainable growth while cultivating key client and partner relationship.
  • Delivering APAC business plan and managing core functions including operations, marketing, Finance, HR and IT.
  • Demonstrate formidable team and leadership skills, earning respect from peers and guiding others through demanding situations.
  • Collaborate with design teams and clients to localise solutions, maintain strong relationships, and troubleshoot issues.
  • Function as a positive leadership role model, demonstrating integrity, accountability, and collaboration acrossthe global team.
  • Support the development of staff and future leaders through training initiatives, mentoring, and career growth opportunities.
  • Manage regional P&L, project financial performance, resources, and contract negotiations to ensureprofitability.
  • Ensure compliance with QA/QC processes, health and safety legislation, and internal control systems.
  • Monitor risk, performance, programmes, and reporting processes to anticipate challenges and safeguarddelivery.
  • Provide leadership in proposals, bids, reporting, and communication with directors, clients, and supply chainpartners.
  • Deliver consistent success with clients, building trust, generating work, and representing B&W externallyat a prominent level.
  • Manage projects with sound business awareness and financial acumen, ensuring technical and financialsuccess over time.
  • Think and act on behalf of the wider business, prioritising collective success over individual or unit interests.
  • Drive business development, growth initiatives, and continuous improvement of systems and procedures.
  • Contribute effectively to business-wide activities, strategy, and continuous improvement aligned with B&W’s philosophy.
  • Innovate by bringing forward latest ideas, solutions, and approaches that strengthen the business and itsoperations.

postedCompany.description: Black & White Engineering is a global MEP design consultancy. We delight in presenting quality in all we offer. We listen, collaborate and challenge to provide simple, practical and agile solutions to our clients’ changing needs.
postedCompany.name: BLACK & WHITE ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
